sentences.text: As you look at your snapshot, you'll hit terms like "APR" or "net monthly position".
Understanding these isn't just about definitions — it's about knowing how they affect your decisions.
Say your snapshot flagged high-interest debt.
Instead of Googling "What is APR" and getting a generic definition, ask AI: "I keep seeing APR on credit card offers — what does it actually mean for my situation?"
AI connects the term to your specific decision context, so you're not just learning definitions, you're understanding what to do with them.
